raw_response: Given your quality sensitivity and brand familiarity with Sennheiser, the Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless headphones are a great choice despite being slightly above your budget. They offer exceptional sound quality, robust noise cancellation, and an impressive 60-hour battery life. While touch controls may have a learning curve, their wireless performance and audio fidelity make them worth considering for casual use.
